Brokers • 2/8/2026 • 8 min read

Top 10 Brokerage Business Trends in 2024

Key trends shaping the brokerage business: AI, cryptocurrencies, mobile trading, social trading, and regulatory changes.

MakeTrades Team
MakeTrades Expert

Technology-Driven Trends

Artificial intelligence is transforming every aspect of brokerage operations: from AI-powered client support chatbots and automated compliance screening to algorithmic risk management and personalized trading recommendations. Mobile-first platforms now process over 70% of retail trades, while API-driven architectures enable rapid integration of new services and liquidity sources.

Product Innovation

Social and copy trading continue growing, with platforms reporting 40% year-over-year increase in copy trading volumes. Prop trading integration into traditional brokerages creates new revenue streams. Fractional share trading democratizes access to expensive stocks. Crypto asset integration becomes standard rather than optional as client demand for digital asset exposure accelerates.

Regulatory Evolution

Stricter global regulation is reshaping the competitive landscape. MiCA implementation in Europe, ongoing SEC scrutiny in the US, and new frameworks in Asia-Pacific create compliance challenges but also opportunities for well-prepared brokers. ESG-focused investment products and sustainability reporting requirements are emerging as the next wave of regulatory expectations.

Tags: trendsbrokersAIcryptocurrenciesmobile trading
